name: e2e-test-builder
description: Adds Playwright E2E tests end to end — analyzes existing setup, explores the live product in a browser, plans coverage, generates specs, writes tests, and stabilizes them across multiple sessions
examplePrompts: Add E2E tests for the login and signup flows at https://myapp.com
Build Playwright coverage for the checkout process
Write E2E tests for the dashboard and settings pages
